briefs.title: Council to Consider Petition Opposing Supportive Housing Project at 5389 Imperial Street
briefs.summary: Council will consider a supplementary petition from Burnaby Neighbourhood Watch — signed by 981 residents — opposing a proposed BC Housing supportive/complex care housing development at 5389 Imperial Street. This follows an earlier petition with 11,749 signatures asking Council to reject the project.
briefs.action_required: Attend the February 10, 2026 Council meeting if you want to follow or respond to this housing proposal.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — supplementary petition considered for 5389 Imperial St housing proposal

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Healthcare
